title: Z-Q&A&RP
subtitle: Questions · Answers · Resolutions · Pathways — DRP-aligned ecosystem loop
purpose: Ground Q&A and self-inquiry in full-system knowledge and reports; route improvements through governance (SEPC, DRP, Enforcer). No autonomous execution.

pathways.sepc_note: SKK + RKPK dual pass before escalation — see Z_RESOLUTION_PATHWAYS.md

self_inquiry_templates: What is the true current state (reports + paths), not assumptions?
What can be done within repo policy and DRP?
What should be done next for the poorest / most excluded stakeholder affected?
Which DRP gates apply to this change (list 1–14)?
Does SEPC allow escalation, or should we pause?
What would Zuno + ZCI + Garage planner say — and where is human approval required?
handoff_rules: Recommendations may feed Z-Garage / ZCI / Zuno artifacts via existing scripts (e.g. npm run z:garage:full-scan).
Never imply Enforcer or release gates are overridden.
Cross-project paths must match z_pc_root_projects.json / EAII registry truth (gate 13).
